lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮੁ ਸੰਗੀ ਤਿਸੁ ਗਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਨਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: raam sangee tis gat nahee jaaneh |
lines.english: The Lord is your only companion; no one knows His condition.
You ignorant fool, who is your companion?
Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:
What supports you in this world?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਰਵੀਅਹਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਕਰਿ ਮਨ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gun govind raveeeh din raatee saadhasang kar man kee preet |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Chant the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe, day and night; in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, love Him in your mind. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਘਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਉਧਰਹਿ ਮੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: so ghar sev jit udhareh meet |
lines.english: Serve that home, which will save you, my friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਬਟਵਾਰੇ ਸੇ ਮੀਤ ਕਰਿ ਮਾਨਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: panch battavaare se meet kar maaneh |1|
lines.english: You look upon the five thieves as your friends. ||1||
This human life is passing away in egotism and conflict.
Wandering and roaming around, you suffer terrible pain.
You are not satisfied; such is the flavor of sin.
You cannot cross over the impassable sea of Maya. ||2||
There is none other than the Lord to save you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਸੁ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: kaam na aavai su kaar kamaavai |
lines.english: You do the deeds which do not help you at all.
As you plant, so shall you harvest.
Please bless Your slave with that gift.
Your Name, God, is the Purifier of sinners.
You will be saved, only if God grants His Grace. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਗਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਮੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa prabh gat kar meree |
lines.english: Please grant Your Grace, God, and emancipate me.
Nanak has grasped Your Sanctuary, God. ||4||37||48||
Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:
and I will not have to enter the womb of reincarnation ever again. ||1||
I will be respected in the Court of the Lord,
I will not have to appear before the Righteous Judge of Dharma to give my account.
I have found peace in this world.
Now, I know the value of friendship with the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਦੀਨੋ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਸੰਜੋਗਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa deeno har naamaa poorab sanjog milaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In His Mercy, the Lord has blessed me with His Name. My pre-ordained destiny has been fulfilled. ||1||Pause||
and all my sins and pains have been eradicated. ||2||
My consciousness is attached to the Guru's feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕੀ ਧੂਰਿ ਲਾਗੀ ਮੇਰੈ ਮਾਥੇ ॥
lines.translit: sant kee dhoor laagee merai maathe |
lines.english: I have applied the dust of the Saints' feet to my forehead,
Blessed, blessed is this fortunate time of union.
I have seen the fruitful vision of the Lord's humble slave.
Performing true service to the Holy,
the mortal's mind is purified.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਕਾ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਵੂਠਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naam prabhoo kaa ghatt ghatt vootthaa |3|
lines.english: God's Name dwells within each and every heart. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਤੇ ਉਪਜੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਹਿ ਪਰਵੇਸ ॥
lines.translit: jis te upaje tis meh paraves |
lines.english: I have merged into the One, from whom I originated.
All my troubles and sufferings have been taken away;
The Lord of the Universe, incomparably beautiful, has become merciful.
O Nanak, God is perfect and forgiving. ||4||38||49||
Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:
The tiger leads the cow to the pasture,
when God bestows His Glance of Grace. ||1||
and the elephant nurses the goat,
the shell is worth thousands of dollars,

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਰਨਿ ਨ ਸਾਕਉ ਬਹੁ ਗੁਨ ਤੇਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: baran na saakau bahu gun tere |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I cannot even describe Your many Glorious Virtues. ||1||Pause||
The cat sees the meat, but does not eat it,
You are the treasure of mercy, O my Beloved Lord God.
the net holding the fish breaks apart. ||2||
the Creator Lord God abides in the heart;
and the great butcher throws away his knife;
in the high desert, the beautiful lotus flower blooms.
The dry wood blossoms forth in greenery and red flowers;
The Divine True Guru puts out the fire.
He links His servant to His service. ||3||
He saves even the ungrateful;
my God is forever merciful.
Nanak has found the Sanctuary of His lotus feet. ||4||39||50||
He is forever the helper and support of the humble Saints.
Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:
